title: Drive-thru weed cash-flow — fall-2022 setup todos and a Tessa Fowler aside
html:
Drive-thru weed cash-flow — fall-2022 setup todos and a Tessa Fowler aside

Source: 2022-09-13 Apple Note. Title is the only business idea — a drive-thru cannabis dispensary as a cash-flow play — and the rest is fall-term setup logistics + a draft DM to Tessa Fowler.

TL;DR

  • Business seed: "Drive thru weed - cash flow" — a one-line business idea, presumably inspired by Oregon's adult-use market. Frame is cash-flow, not equity — Yahir thinking about bridge income rather than venture upside. Single sibling line: "Crypto - excitement" — the contrast is the point. Weed = boring cash, crypto = thrill.
  • Fall-term setup: insurance, teeth whitening, contact lenses, scar cream, a haircut, a multicolored Adidas hoodie, scholarship-funding-delay emails. Yahir is building the operating environment before the term spins up — same pattern he repeats every academic transition.
  • OSIG cadence: "begin doing work for OSIG (set the tone)" — explicit intent to lead from week one of the term, not coast.
  • Family-and-funding hygiene: laptop sent to JCEF (the JCEF scholarship cohort), once-a-week call with Emilio established as a weekday ritual.
  • The Tessa Fowler draft: "Hey! It was dope seeing you. I hope to see you around!" Followed by the Spotify-handle scrap "T Fowler @voarg" and a song reference "Part time lover." Yahir was writing a low-key follow-up DM and chose not to send it (or did and didn't record the response).

Pattern observed

This is one of the cleanest examples of Yahir's mode at term-start: one half-formed business idea, a personal-grooming setup checklist, an org-leadership commitment, and a flirtatious DM draft — all in 50 lines. The drive-thru-weed seed never recurs in the vault, but the cash-flow vs. excitement axis he draws here keeps showing up — it's the same axis behind the later bridge income thinking and the Austin cost-of-living math.

Tessa Fowler is a single-mention name and stays incidental — added to potential entities below.

Key snippets

  • "Drive thru weed - cash flow."
  • "Crypto - excitement."
  • "begin doing work for OSIG (set the tone)."
